SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearAnomalies

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl.ViewRiksdagenElectionYearAnomalies
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearAnomalies extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearAnomalies. Database view for election year anomaly detection with z-score thresholds (|z| > 1.5). Filters election years only with statistically unusual patterns.
See Also:
